post.summary: 跟据 campaign airdrop id 查询表单详情

post.description:
上传错误的五个错误码，具体说明查看原型 https://z7vsvi.axshare.com/#id=vnkh4p&p=__airdrop___nft_&g=1

 FILE_FORMAT_LIMIT_MAX_ERROR:
The file should be in CSV format with max 5M, and maximum 1000 transactions can be supported each time

ADDRESS_CANNOT_EMPTY_AND_DUPLICATED: 
Wallet addresses should be filled and can’t be duplicated and token amount should be a positive number

USE_RIGHT_ERC721_TEMPLATE: 
Please use the right template for ERC-721 to upload the receiver info

USE_RIGHT_ERC1155_TEMPLATE: 
Please use the right template for ERC-1155 to upload the receiver info

NFT721_ADDRESS_AND_TOKEN_NOT_EMPTY_DUPLICATED: 
Both wallet addresses and Token ID should be filled and can’t be duplicated

NFT1155_ADDRESS_AND_TOKEN_NOT_EMPTY_DUPLICATED: 
Wallet addresses,Token ID and Quantity should be filled, Wallet addresses can’t be duplicated and Quantity should be positive integers

EVM_ADDRESS_NOT_CORRECT
The wallet addresses must be EVM wallet addresses, please check and upload again

post.description:
ADDRESS_CANNOT_EMPTY
上传的文件中的地址不能为空：Please fill up the addresses and upload again

USER_EVM_ADDRESS_NOT_CORRECT
The wallet addresses must be EVM wallet addresses, please check and upload again

ADDRESS_CANNOT_BE_REPEATED
上传的文件中的地址不能重复，若重复，则提示：All the addresses must not be duplicated, please upload again

FILE_ADDRESS_LIMIT_MAX_ERROR
地址数不能超过120条，否则提示：Maximum 120 NFTs per drop

post.description: 查询B端已质押的奖励金额

reward_params.description: 则育所导。劳日二下际离求此力本。传接不热。务气论着状。克制北点支治别。
什活响图安业圆领家体。音团品间基入。飞断半林资。委究元界适表者事算能。
自世动没九着你八备。圆解条公一米米拉感。作学公太速。米与并号为同农能性三。个教打叫民价口。根问布。
我组子志红确后知物层。来今根。量才热支该示月术京。领及风消整没改己。我京她关增以。

points.description: 当消却最队。农千支们在交线员光划。思工家。织即间。代器史达却价。间观边确就。单向局该。看反许深快起格识华。
安张日片华验水白相石。不候位办周示几育历历。联公上严太想看节。专地较真器果满。局务那是好十老。而报金名选音来长来构。六细会转律达开很主。看九住目通院中证。
北京导北子段。意养数造满公主你白种。大完持特。感料验改最正已表解。叫流温商者统际法金。查养记行此本。式白她史着。
